body.title: sprint-ticket CAPABILITY CHECK reads ADC routing manifest dynamically
body.result: capability check now calls datacenter_manifest(routing_only=True) as primary; tag heuristics as fallback
body.description:
The CAPABILITY CHECK step in /sprint-ticket has hardcoded tag→tool heuristics (e.g. 'tag includes Database → mcp__igor__db_query'). Replace with a call to mcp__datacenter__datacenter_manifest(routing_only=True) and match ticket tags against the returned routing_map. This makes new ADC devices automatically reachable without manual skill file edits.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/sprint-ticket/SKILL.md
**Design rules:** Skill files are user config, not ADC source — no inertia concerns. The manifest routing_map must be live before this ships.
**Scope boundary:** In scope: update CAPABILITY CHECK step in sprint-ticket only. Out of scope: updating /decided, /sprint-batch, or other skills (can follow once pattern is established).
**Test plan:** Manual verification — sprint a ticket and confirm CAPABILITY CHECK output references manifest-sourced tool name rather than hardcoded rule match. No automated test (skill files are not unit-testable).
